description:
Foreground / background separation using BiRefNet (MIT). Returns an RGBA cutout with a straight (non-premultiplied) alpha channel, so downstream nodes can re-composite over any background without dark fringes. 
Two profiles are shipped: the default 1K BiRefNet and a higher-resolution 2K variant for fine hair / detailed edges. Runs on CPU, Apple Silicon (MPS), and CUDA.

input.description: AVI image stream to remove the background from.

output.description: RGBA PNG (straight alpha) as raw stream — pipe to any node accepting image input.

maxEdge.description: Downscale source so long edge <= this value before inference; alpha is upsampled back to the (capped) source size for compositing. Lower = faster + less VRAM; higher = sharper edges.
maxEdge.title: Max input edge (px)

profile.description: BiRefNet variant — default is 1K, HR is 2K for finer edges.
profile.title: Model

ui:enumNames: BiRefNet HR — 2K, finer hair / edge detail (MIT)

title: Background Removal
